children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year such sums as are necessary to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: b Administrative expenses
children.text: Funds appropriated under subsection (a) may not be used for the payment of the expenses or expenditures of the PromoFlor Council in administering a provision of an order.
